charter: Implement the next tusq.dev increment from VISION.md and existing M12 V2 planning: replace manual manifest approval edits with a governed repo-local tusq approve workflow. Add a CLI command that approves selected capabilities in tusq.manifest.json, records approved_by and approved_at, supports list/dry-run/json behavior where appropriate, and preserves existing review/compile boundaries. This is new product work beyond M17; do not treat existing M1-M17 artifacts as sufficient.
acceptance_contract: Adds tusq approve command and help surface
Can approve one capability by name with reviewer identity and timestamp
Can approve all review-needed or unapproved capabilities intentionally
Supports dry-run or json output for auditability
Updates smoke or eval coverage and docs/planning artifacts

history.reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval

archived_reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval
